name: search_issues
description: Perform a full-text search across all issues in the Linear workspace. Search matches against issue titles, descriptions, and comments. Results are ranked by relevance. Useful for finding issues related to a specific topic or keyword without knowing the exact team or project.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query string using the issueSearch query.
parameters.example: { issueSearch(query: "authentication timeout", first: 10) { nodes { id identifier title } } }

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: The search term or phrase to look for across issues.

parameters.name: first
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

body.query: { issueSearch(query: "authentication timeout", first: 10) { nodes { id identifier title description priority url state { name } assignee { name } labels { nodes { name } } project { name } createdAt } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

nodes.title: Fix authentication timeout
nodes.description: Users are experiencing timeout errors when logging in with SSO.

nodes.title: Session timeout too aggressive
nodes.description: Users report being logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity.
